symbol: 股票代码 / 证券代码 (Symbol / Ticker)
stock_name: 股票简称 / 企业名称 (Stock Name)
report_date: 报告期 / 报表日期 (Report Date)
revenue_yoy: 营业收入同比变动率 (Revenue Year-on-Year Growth Rate)
operating_cost: 其中：营业成本 (Operating Cost / Cost of Goods Sold)
operating_taxes_and_surcharge: 营业税金及附加 (Operating Taxes and Surcharges)
rad_cost: 研发费用 (Research and Development Expenses)
net_profit_yoy: 净利润同比变动率 (Net Profit Year-on-Year Growth Rate)
net_profit_atsopc: 归母净利润 (Net Profit Attributable to Shareholders of Parent Company)
asset_impairment_loss: 资产减值损失 (Asset Impairment Loss)
credit_impairment_loss: 信用减值损失 (Credit Impairment Loss)
total_assets: 资产总额 / 总资产 (Total Assets)
total_liab: 负债总额 / 总负债 (Total Liabilities)
total_quity_atsopc: 归属于母公司所有者权益合计 / 净资产 (Total Equity Attributable to Shareholders of Parent Company)
total_current_assets: 流动资产合计 (Total Current Assets)
total_current_liab: 流动负债合计 (Total Current Liabilities)
currency_funds: 货币资金 (Cash and Cash Equivalents)
ar_and_br: 应收票据及应收账款 (Accounts and Notes Receivable)
bp_and_ap: 应付票据及应付账款 (Accounts and Notes Payable)
fixed_asset_sum: 固定资产合计 (Total Fixed Assets)
noncurrent_liab_due_in1y: 一年内到期的非流动负债 (Noncurrent Liabilities Due Within One Year)
net_cash_flow_operating: 经营活动产生的现金流量净额 (Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities)
cash_from_sales: 销售商品、提供劳务收到的现金 (Cash Received from Sales of Goods or Rendering of Services)
cash_paid_for_goods: 购买商品、接受劳务支付的现金 (Cash Paid for Goods and Services)
cash_paid_for_assets: 购建固定资产、无形资产和其他长期资产支付的现金 (Cash Paid to Acquire Fixed Assets)
net_cash_of_disposal_assets: 处置固定资产、无形资产和其他长期资产收回的现金净额 (Net Cash Received from Disposal of Assets)
roe: 净资产收益率 (%) [基于平均股东权益修正] (Return on Equity)
free_cash_flow: 自由现金流 [完善版] (Free Cash Flow)
cash_received_ratio: 收现比 (销售商品收现 / 营业收入) (Cash Received Ratio)
cash_paid_ratio: 付现比 (购买商品付现 / 营业成本) (Cash Paid Ratio)
ar_turnover: 应收账款周转率 (次) [基于平均应收账款修正] (Accounts Receivable Turnover)
inventory_turnover: 存货周转率 (次) [基于平均存货修正] (Inventory Turnover)
impairment_to_revenue_ratio: 资产及信用减值损失占营业收入比重 (%) [资产质量指标] (Impairment to Revenue Ratio)
cash_to_st_debt_ratio: 现金短期债务比 [防爆雷安全垫指标] (Cash to Short-Term Debt Ratio)
net_supply_chain_capital_occupied: 净占用上下游资金差额 [产业链话语权指标] (Net Supply Chain Capital Occupied)
